query: SELECT ca.id, ca.sectorSlug, ca.dayOfMonth, ca.month, ca.year, ca.orderInDay, ar.likes, LEFT(ar.title, 40) as title FROM calendar_assignments ca JOIN approved_reels ar ON ca.approvedReelId = ar.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31C4iMxDJJnqeCT.3c78779329cc --database YpkX7UBRCFyoNjYW5eCLWn --execute SELECT ca.id, ca.sectorSlug, ca.dayOfMonth, ca.month, ca.year, ca.orderInDay, ar.likes, LEFT(ar.title, 40) as title FROM calendar_assignments ca JOIN approved_reels ar ON ca.approvedReelId = ar.id;
